column.name: email_body
column.value:
Dear $userName,

Your complaint $complainNo has been Resolved.Kindly give your feedback regarding your interaction with our Customer Service & Implementation Team, for any further Assistance kindly contact on our toll free 18002664986.

column.name: email_body
column.value: Dear $userName, your complaint $complainNo has been Resolved.Kindly give your feedback regarding your interaction with our Customer Service & Implementation Team, for any further Assistance kindly contact on $contactNo, or can drop SMS on our whatsapp no.$whatsappNo1 and $whatsappNo2.

column.name: email_body
column.value: Dear Subscriber, your speed of $planName will be reduced after usage of $usage for the rest of current month. You can renew your plan to avail high speed.

column.name: email_body
column.value: Dear Customer, Your account has been renewed with package $planName on $date.

column.name: email_body
column.value: We are pleased to inform that your Internet Service has been enabled. Enjoy Browsing.\n\n

column.name: email_body
column.value:
Dear Partner,

Your Partner Agreement initiated. Please submit.

column.name: email_body
column.value:
Dear $userName,

Your Static IP $ip for account $userName is going to expire on $expiry.

column.name: email_body
column.value:
Dear Customer,

Your profile information has been updated. For your records, here is a copy of the information you submitted to us... Email Address: $email, Mobile No.: $mobile, GSTIN: $gstin

column.name: email_body
column.value:
Dear $userName

We regret to inform that the account with user id : $userName is suspended. Please contact us for queries.

column.name: email_body
column.value: Thank you we have received the Charge of $amount Rs and Applied Charge $chargeName.\n\n

column.name: email_body
column.value: We regret to inform that your Internet Service has been disabled. Please contact us for queries.\n\n

column.name: email_body
column.value: We regret to inform you that your Internet Service is Terminated, please contact us.\n\n

column.name: email_body
column.value:
Dear Customer,

Your account has been regd with: ID: $userName password: $password Regi.Dt: $registerDate Plan:$planName.

column.name: email_body
column.value:
Dear $userName,

Your account with user ID : $userName has been renewed with package $planName on $date .

column.name: email_body
column.value:
Dear $userName,

We Have Received Your Complaint with complaint id $complainNo, Resolution Process has been started..

column.name: email_body
column.value: Your OTP For Forgot Password is $otp

changeSet.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nextvaltrial; // CREATE FUNCTION nextvaltrial (seq_name varchar(100)) RETURNS bigint BEGIN DECLARE cur_val bigint; SELECT cur_value INTO cur_val FROM sequence WHERE name = seq_name; IF cur_val IS NOT NULL THEN UPDATE sequence SET cur_value = IF ( (cur_value + increment) > max_value OR (cur_value + increment) < min_value, IF ( cycle = TRUE, IF ( (cur_value + increment) > max_value, min_value, max_value ), NULL ), cur_value + increment ) WHERE name = seq_name; END IF; RETURN cur_val; END //

column.value:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is a confirmation that we've just received your

recent payment of Rs. {paymentAmount} on

{paymentDate} against Receipt No: {reciptNo}

subscribed under the User ID: {userName}

We would like to thank you for your continuous trust

towards our service.

You can login to our Customer Portal

https://selfcare.subisu.net.np/ and access your

Account, Change Password, Plan details and much

more activity at your convenience.

If you have any queries, please do not hesitate to

contact us at Email support@subisu.net.np or

connect us at: 01-4235888 / 9801235888

REFER and WIN 1 Month bonus Subscription

Browse www.subisu.net.np and www.cleartv.com.np

to grab our latest offers.

Thank You.

SUBISU

column.name: smstemplatedata
column.value: Dear {username}, Your subscription for {planname} is deactivated due to non-payment. To reactivate, pleasepay within {2 days} days through our website or outlets. Contact us at {emailId}.Thank you.

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value:
Dear {username},

We hope this message finds you well. We regret to inform you that your account with us will be

deactivated on {date}. This deactivation is due to {remarks}, and unfortunately, we are

unable to reverse this decision.

Please note that after the deactivation date, you will no longer be able to access your account or any of

the features and benefits of our service. If you have any questions or concerns about this deactivation,

please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team for assistance.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

SUBISU

column.name: smstemplatedata
column.value: Dear {userName}, your OTP for verification is {otp}. Please enter this code in the required field to complete the verification process. Thank you.

column.name: emailtemplatedata
column.value:
Dear {userName},

As part of our ongoing efforts to keep your account secure, we are introducing a new layer of

authentication. Starting {datetime}, you will be required to verify your account using a One-Time

Password {otp} whenever you log in to your account or perform any transaction.

The OTP will be sent to your registered mobile number or email address that is linked to your

account. Please ensure that your contact details are up-to-date to receive the OTP promptly.

To complete the OTP verification process, please follow the instructions provided when you

receive the OTP. You will be prompted to enter the OTP and authenticate your account.

Please note that failing to complete the OTP verification process within {timeframe} will result

in restricted access to your account. We recommend you complete the process as soon as

possible to avoid any inconvenience.

If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support

team. We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to providing you with a secure and

seamless experience.

Best regards,

SUBISU
